dimensions.title: Delivery
dimensions.description: Completes agreed outcomes and manages scope.

dimensions.title: Technical quality
dimensions.description: Produces clear, reliable and maintainable work.

dimensions.title: Problem solving
dimensions.description: Makes sound assumptions and handles ambiguity.

dimensions.title: Communication
dimensions.description: Explains progress, decisions and risks clearly.

dimensions.title: Professionalism
dimensions.description: Uses evidence, responds to feedback and documents work.
